status_notes: Generated from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21; org metadata copied from existing same-org entries under other SecID types.
notes: The Debian Project is a volunteer-driven organization that develops and maintains the Debian GNU/Linux distribution. Debian serves as the upstream for many other distributions including Ubuntu. Debian operates a comprehensive security response program including DSA (Debian Security Advisories), DLA (Debian LTS Advisories), and a security tracker.
